name: Double-Crust Pastry
recipeInstructions: Combine the flour and salt. Cut in the shortening using a pastry blender until the mixture resembles coarse meal. Gradually sprinkle cold water, one tablespoon at a time, over the surface and stir with a fork until the dry ingredients are well moistened. Form into a ball and chill. Yield: enough pastry for one double-crust pie.
